name: The Entrance to the great library
description:
You stand now where one day was the entrance hall for the great library of
Thalos.  Looking around you find some statues with different forms, which vary
from lions to something you remember as from a nightmare.  All around you can
notice that this place is not used for years, thick layers of dust gather here,
some statues are broken, the remaining statues look so alive...  You can go
inside by north or go back to the city.
